name: Community State Bank
description_short: Ankeny, IA Community State Bank at 817 N Ankeny Blvd provides full-service banking for personal and business accounts.
description_long:
Located at 817 N Ankeny Blvd in Ankeny, IA, Community State Bank operates as a full-service branch in the city's commercial area. The branch is housed in a standalone building, making it easily accessible for both drive-up and walk-in banking.

This Ankeny branch offers personal and business banking services, including account opening, loan origination, and deposit account management. For specific hours and service details, visit the location or contact the branch directly.

For Ankeny residents seeking community-focused banking, Community State Bank provides local service. When visiting, bring your ID and any relevant financial documents for account opening or loan applications.
services: Edge Checking® account with rewards and bonuses
Select 50 Checking account for frequent travelers
Mobile banking app with check deposit
Digital wallet support (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay)
ATM network access and locator tool
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government full faith and credit
Edge Checking® account with $400 new account bonus
Mobile check deposit and bill pay directly through smartphone app
Free credit score monitoring through Credit Sense feature
Digital wallet compatibility with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay
Zelle integration for fast peer-to-peer money transfers
Referral rewards program ($50 per successful referral)
Wealth management services including investment strategies and retirement planning
cons: Website does not disclose specific APY rates, annual percentage yields, or fee schedules
Limited information about minimum balance requirements or account maintenance fees
No details provided about loan products, credit lines, or mortgage services despite being a full-service bank
Geographic service area and branch locations not specified on accessible website content
New headquarters construction mentioned without completion timeline or service continuity assurances
best_for: Consumers seeking modern mobile banking with check deposit and bill pay capabilities
Individuals interested in rewards-based checking accounts with bonus sign-up offers
Business owners and associations requiring relationship-based banking (per Iowa State Association of Counties testimonial)
Tech-savvy users wanting digital wallet integration and contactless payments
diagnosis: Community State Bank is best suited for consumers wanting a feature-rich checking account with mobile-first banking, rewards, and bonuses from an FDIC-insured institution. The primary caveat is that critical information—interest rates, fees, and loan products—is absent from the website, requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed product comparison before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community State Bank at 817 N Ankeny Blvd, Ankeny, IA. Full-service banking for personal and business needs.
